taxonomy: Chaetochloa geniculata is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. The classification of Chaetochloa geniculata is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Monocots, order Poales, family Poaceae, genus Chaetochloa, and species C. geniculata. It belongs to the subfamily Panicoideae. Chaetochloa geniculata is further divided into two subspecies, C. geniculata subsp. geniculata and C. geniculata subsp. parviflora. The classification is based on various botanical studies and taxonomic analyses.
